lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. It has been exceptionally well-maintained and remains in like-new condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and is in perfect working order. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage.

This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a rewarding project! While it is currently in poor condition and will require some mechanical and cosmetic attention, it's a budget-friendly option with plenty of potential for the right person to restore. It's an honest car ready for its next chapter!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, intended for parts or as a dedicated restoration project. It is not currently roadworthy. The engine has a severe, persistent knock and multiple significant fluid leaks that require immediate attention. Additionally, the transmission is slipping and struggles to shift into gear. The exterior has noticeable rust and paint damage, while the interior shows heavy wear. This car is recommended only for experienced mechanics or those looking for a donor vehicle.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior remains in great shape, showing only minor signs of use such as a few light surface scratches and small stone chips on the hood. The interior is clean and well-kept, with only slight wear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the car is sound and performs reliably in all conditions. It has a complete service history and is ready for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes an optimal balance between performance and value. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic. With a focus on reliability and driver comfort, it represents a premier opportunity for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the refined handling and sophisticated interior of this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s still got so much life left in her! It’s been a fantastic car for me, super reliable and well-maintained over the years. It’s in really solid shape and ready to hit the road with a new owner today. I'm happy to answer any questions you have—let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This example retains its crisp throttle response thanks to independent throttle bodies and a meticulously maintained double VANOS system. Power is delivered through a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to the rear wheels via a factory M-Variable differential lock. The chassis remains taut with recent bushing refreshes and documented subframe reinforcement, ensuring the structural integrity of the monocoque remains uncompromised. Finished in Carbon Black, the paint shows minor road patina consistent with spirited use. Recent preventative maintenance includes a rod bearing service and a cooling system overhaul, making this a mechanically sound platform for the discerning purist seeking a linear power band and exceptional steering feedback.
Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior finish retains a deep luster, showing only the minor, superficial character marks expected of a well-loved car that has been driven with care. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery and dashboard remaining supple and free of significant wear. Mechanically, the car is in solid health; it starts promptly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and the braking is firm and responsive. I have kept a comprehensive folder of service records documenting regular fluid changes and preventative maintenance to ensure long-term reliability. The tires offer plenty of tread for several seasons ahead, and all interior electronics, including the infotainment and climate control systems, function exactly as they should. This is a dependable, turn-key vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this specimen exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic finish. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliability and sophisticated engineering.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies balanced performance and enduring style. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure mechanical reliability and a refined driving experience. Featuring a clean profile and a well-appointed interior, it stands as a testament to conscientious prior ownership. Having successfully undergone our comprehensive multi-point inspection, this vehicle offers an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver seeking both prestige and dependability.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home! This car has been so reliable for me and is still in great shape for its next adventure. It runs like a dream and the interior is super clean—perfect for anyone looking for a solid, dependable vehicle they can count on. Come take it for a spin, I just know you're going to love how it drives!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specimen, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is paired with a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a factory-spec M-variable differential lock. Critical preventive maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement to ensure structural and internal longevity. The chassis retains its signature 50
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained sedan presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, complemented by well-preserved alloy wheels and tires with ample tread. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features supple leather seating with minimal wear, a crystal-clear infotainment display, and a premium audio system that sounds as crisp as the day it was built. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. Every feature, from the heated seats to the advanced safety sensors, functions perfectly. This vehicle strikes the ideal balance between luxury and reliability, offering a smooth, confident ride that feels solid on both city streets and open highways.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent care and dependable performance, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and reliability.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety. Offering an exceptional balance of luxury and value, this motorcar represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been a total gem. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and still drives like a dream! It’s been well-loved and is ready for its next big adventure. If you're looking for a dependable car that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one. I'd love for you to come by and take it for a spin—I think you're going to love it!

This E92-generation M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated V8. The powerplant utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS to provide immediate throttle response across the rev range, pulling cleanly to its 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to the rear wheels via an M Variable Differential Lock. This vehicle has been maintained with mechanical longevity in mind, including documented preventative rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a rigid subframe. While the aesthetics show minor road wear consistent with its use as a spirited driver, the mechanical integrity remains high, with tight suspension bushings and a leak-free powertrain. A turn-key performance machine for the discerning enthusiast.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring premium upholstery that shows minimal signs of use; all electronics, from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and recent fluid services. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. It has been garage-kept and primarily used for highway commuting. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and reflecting a high standard of mechanical integrity, it offers a refined and reliable driving experience. With its documented service history and well-preserved aesthetic, this unit stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in prime operational condition, ready for immediate delivery.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by reliability and poise. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a dream to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, making it perfect for your daily commutes or fun weekend road trips! It runs smoothly and looks fantastic—you've really got to see it in person. Come take it for a spin and fall in love!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving valvetrain. The chassis remains taut with upgraded poly-bushings and a reinforced rear subframe to mitigate common floor pan fatigue. Power is delivered via a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal mechanical grip. The suspension retains its factory MacPherson strut/multi-link geometry, providing excellent turn-in and mid-corner stability. Recently serviced VANOS system and valve clearance adjustment ensure the dual-overhead cams operate at peak efficiency. A driver-focused example with authentic mechanical feedback and robust performance pedigree.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of pride in ownership, presenting in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the slightest signs of careful road use that one would expect from a well-loved car. Step inside to find a meticulously kept cabin featuring supple seating, a pristine dashboard, and all electronic features functioning exactly as intended. Mechanically, it has been maintained with an open checkbook policy; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, quiet ride. We have recently performed a full fluid service and a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it is ready for its next journey. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that balances value with exceptional care.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, the automobile offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic sophistication. It stands as a testament to consistent care, ensuring both long-term reliability and professional prestige.
